"[39] [Appended, 01:32:17] [1] HOT CLR STRONG WINDS TA'S FOR ALL VEHS"
"[36] [Appended, 02:54:22] [4] VEH STARTED HONKING - DID NOT HAVE TC DAMAGE "
"[30] C74-010 ADV 1185 APPROX 100 FT OF CABLE IS NEEDED [Shared]"
"[28] C74-010 HAD VIS ON OFR // VEH WILL BE ON OFR // WILL TURN AROUND [Shared]"
"[27] [Notification] [CHP]-RP IN GRY MITS IS ON RHS W/ HAZ ON FOR UNIT TO SEE THEM [Shared]"
"[5] CAN SEE FLAMES - UNK IF VEH OR TREE IS ON FIRE - "
"[4] RED FORD TK LOST CONTROL - WENT INTO DITCH IN CD - FIRE NOW STARTING "
"[2] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from INFO-Information to CLOSURE of a Road by CHP"
"[1] Break Eb At Van B Closing 3/4 Lanes Van Buren To Madison"
